title: hibiscus haenkeanus
intro: Hibiscus haenkeanus is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Hibiscus haenkeanus include lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Hibiscus haenkeanus is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for its medicinal and cosmetic uses.
